message:
feat(pager): skip page-1 header rewrite for :memory: autocommit, plus B3.4 commit roundtrip probe

pager.rs (B3.4):
- In :memory: journal mode, skip the page 1 header update unless
  freelist_dirty is true or page 1 is explicitly in the write_set.
  Previously :memory: unconditionally rewrote page 1 on every
  commit, adding unnecessary overhead to autocommit INSERTs that
  don't touch the freelist or change the page count.

prepared_hit_rate_proof.rs (B3.4 probe):
- New test: test_b3_4_memory_autocommit_commit_roundtrip_probe
  runs 1000 :memory: autocommit INSERTs after warmup and measures
  commit_txn_roundtrip_time_ns and execute_body_time_ns per row
  via hot-path profiling counters. Asserts all 1000 inserts hit
  the prepared insert fast lane.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- bd-wwqen epic: updated swarm campaign ledger with current track
  status across B1-B7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
